subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, uttermost praise hath been expressed for thy faith and certitude, thy rapture and attraction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله نهایت ستایش از ایمان و ایقان و وله و انجذاب تو نمودند لازم گشت
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @disregarding individual capacity; weakness, @role and station of women
